narrative:
Precinct Saybrook Twp. 7 (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 438 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.6%, a modest Republican lean of 3.7 percentage points.
